query: SELECT ws.sessionDate, ws.dayLabel, JSON_SEARCH(ws.exercises, 'one', '1-Arm DB Preacher Curl', NULL, '$[*].name') as found FROM workout_sessions ws WHERE ws.userId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'jake@jakehickman.com') ORDER BY ws.sessionDate DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3K2x4Mgy2RpvvVT.root --database HZf6zqYa94nKHY3YxXLHa5 --execute SELECT ws.sessionDate, ws.dayLabel, JSON_SEARCH(ws.exercises, 'one', '1-Arm DB Preacher Curl', NULL, '$[*].name') as found FROM workout_sessions ws WHERE ws.userId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'jake@jakehickman.com') ORDER BY ws.sessionDate DESC LIMIT 10;
